ERROR.SERVER_NOT_ANGULAR: This error comes from the server, not Angular
ERROR.CHECK_NETWORK_TAB: Check the network tab in Chrome Dev Tools
ERROR.REPRODUCE_POSTMAN: Reproduce the error in Postman. If same error, don't troubleshoot Angular code!

ERRORS.INVALID_EMAIL: Please enter a valid email address
ERRORS.PASSWORD_TOO_SHORT: Password must be at least 6 characters long

ERRORS.INVALID_EMAIL: Please enter a valid email address.
ERRORS.MIN_LENGTH: This field must have at least {{min}} characters.
ERRORS.MAX_LENGTH: This field must have no more than {{max}} characters.
ERRORS.OUT_OF_STOCK: This product is out of stock.
ERRORS.SERVER_ERROR: An unexpected server error occurred. Please try again later.
ERRORS.LOGIN_FAILED: Login failed. Please check your credentials.
ERRORS.PAYMENT_FAILED: Payment could not be processed. Please try again.
ERRORS.REFUND_FAILED: Refund request could not be completed.

ERRORS.PasswordRequiresUpper: Password must have at least one uppercase letter ('A'-'Z').
ERRORS.PasswordRequiresNonAlphanumeric: Password must have at least one special character (e.g. !@#$%).
ERRORS.PasswordRequiresDigit: Password must have at least one digit ('0'-'9').
ERRORS.PasswordRequiresLower: Password must have at least one lowercase letter ('a'-'z').
ERRORS.PasswordTooShort: Password must be at least 6 characters long.
ERRORS.PasswordRequiresUniqueChars: Password must use more unique characters.
ERRORS.InvalidToken: This reset link is invalid or has expired. Please request a new one.

ERRORS.GENERIC: Password reset failed. The link may have expired. Please request a new one.

DISCOUNT.NAME: Name
DISCOUNT.USED_IN_ORDERS_DESC: This discount has been applied to one or more orders and must be retained for financial reporting and audit purposes. It cannot be edited or deleted to maintain order history integrity.
DISCOUNT.ACTIVE_EDITING_RESTRICTED_DESC: This discount has already started and cannot be edited to prevent retroactive changes. Use the 'Disable' button if you need to stop it.
DISCOUNT.EXPIRED_READ_ONLY_DESC: This discount has expired and is now read-only to maintain historical accuracy. Expired discounts are automatically inactive.
DISCOUNT.DISABLED_READ_ONLY_DESC: This discount has been manually disabled and is now read-only. It will not apply to any new orders.
DISCOUNT.DRAFT_FULLY_EDITABLE_DESC: This discount hasn't started yet and can be freely edited or deleted. It will become active on {{date}}.
DISCOUNT.NO_PRODUCTS_APPLIED: No products applied to this discount

THEME_SETTINGS.TITLE: Complete Theme Customization
THEME_SETTINGS.SUBTITLE: Create your own custom theme by configuring all color aspects
THEME_SETTINGS.THEME_MODE_DESC: Switch between light and dark themes. You can customize colors for each mode below.
THEME_SETTINGS.BRAND_COLORS_DESC: Define your brand identity with primary, secondary, and accent colors.
THEME_SETTINGS.PRIMARY_COLOR_HINT: Used for main action buttons, primary highlights, badges, and key interactive elements throughout the app
THEME_SETTINGS.SECONDARY_COLOR_HINT: Used for supporting UI elements, secondary buttons, and complementary accents
THEME_SETTINGS.ACCENT_COLOR_HINT: Used for active navigation links, special highlights, and focused states
THEME_SETTINGS.TEXT_COLORS_DESC: Customize text colors used throughout the application. These affect headings, paragraphs, labels, and all text content.
THEME_SETTINGS.PRIMARY_TEXT_HINT: Main text color for headings, titles, and important content
THEME_SETTINGS.SECONDARY_TEXT_HINT: Text color for descriptions, subtitles, and supporting information
THEME_SETTINGS.TERTIARY_TEXT_HINT: Text color for hints, captions, and less prominent information
THEME_SETTINGS.BACKGROUND_COLORS_DESC: Set the background colors for different sections and surfaces.
THEME_SETTINGS.MAIN_BACKGROUND_HINT: Primary background color for the main app content area
THEME_SETTINGS.SECONDARY_BACKGROUND_HINT: Background color for cards, panels, and secondary content areas
THEME_SETTINGS.SURFACE_HINT: Background color for overlays, modals, and elevated surfaces
THEME_SETTINGS.UI_ELEMENTS_DESC: Fine-tune colors for specific UI components and elements.
THEME_SETTINGS.PRODUCT_CARD_HINT: Background color for individual product cards displayed in the shop grid
THEME_SETTINGS.ADVANCED_UI_DESC: Fine-tune borders, inputs, and button text
THEME_SETTINGS.BORDER_COLOR_HINT: Used for card borders, dividers, and element outlines
THEME_SETTINGS.INPUT_BACKGROUND_HINT: Background color for form inputs, text fields, and search boxes
THEME_SETTINGS.BUTTON_TEXT_HINT: Text color for buttons to ensure readability
THEME_SETTINGS.SAMPLE_CARD_DESC: This card demonstrates how content will appear with your selected theme colors.
